features: 100% Natural Pau D’Arco Tea – Crafted from pure Tabebuia impetiginosa bark, known for centuries in the Amazon for its immune-boosting and detoxifying properties. No fillers or additives for a clean infusion.
Supports Immunity & Daily Vitality – A naturally caffeine-free herbal tea that helps strengthen the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote full-body wellness with every sip.
Mild Herbal Infusion with Lapacho Bark – Enjoy a smooth, earthy flavor sourced from Brazilian rainforest trees, ideal for daily detox, anti-inflammatory support, and clean living enthusiasts.
Unbleached, Plastic-Free Tea Bags – Eco-friendly tea bags made with biodegradable materials. Free from GMOs, allergens, dairy, gluten, and preservatives—perfect for a conscious lifestyle.
Sustainably Harvested in Brazil – Pau D’Arco bark is carefully sourced from deep within the Amazon. Every 40-teabag pouch supports ethical harvesting and honors ancient botanical traditions.

soft, green, earthy flavor—not overpowering Slightly bitter and woody, like black tea or coffee Cat’s Claw is a bitter herb, which is why Rio Amazon Cat’s Claw tea bags contain added Cinnamon, Ginger, Cardamon and Orange peel, giving the tea a pleasant, warming taste Mildly bitter, earthy herbal taste Light, earthy herbal taste Teabag & Packaging Material Plastic-free & unbleached teabags, recyclable packaging Plastic-free & unbleached teabags, recyclable packaging Plastic-free & unbleached teabags, recyclable packaging Plastic-free & unbleached teabags, recyclable packaging Plastic-free & unbleached teabags, recyclable packaging Plastic-free & unbleached teabags, recyclable packaging Caffeine Content None None Contains naturally-occurring caffeine None None None Your Questions Answered Everything you need to know about Pau d’Arco Tea Q: What is Pau d’Arco? A: Pau d’Arco ( Tabebuia impetiginosa ), also known as Lapacho, is a tree native to the Amazon rainforest and other regions of South America. The inner bark of the tree has been traditionally prepared as a herbal infusion for generations. Q: What part of the plant is used in Rio Amazon Pau d’Arco Tea? A: Our Pau d’Arco tea is made from the inner bark of the Tabebuia impetiginosa tree, carefully cut and prepared for traditional herbal infusion. Q: Is Pau d’Arco tea caffeine-free? A: Yes — Pau d’Arco is naturally caffeine-free, making it suitable to enjoy at any time of day. Q: How do I prepare Rio Amazon Pau d’Arco Tea? A: Infuse one teabag in freshly boiled water for at least 5 minutes. For loose tea, simmer two teaspoons in two cups of water for 5–10 minutes. Then strain and enjoy. Q: How many cups can I drink daily? A: You can enjoy 1–3 cups per day as part of your daily routine. We recommend taking occasional breaks when consuming any herbal tea regularly. Q: Is it suitable for vegetarians and vegans? A: Yes — our Pau d’Arco tea is 100% plant-based and suitable for vegetarian and vegan diets. Q: Who should consult a healthcare professional before use? A: If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking medication, or have a medical condition, please consult your healthcare practitioner before use.
